meta.description: Windows 11 Notepad (Tabbed UWP). Multi-document app — multiple tabs per window. Use SENDKEYS {CTRL+N} (scenario: new-document) to open a new tab instead of launching a second process. All text operations use SENDKEYS or READ on the window handle.

Multi-document tabbed Notepad (Windows 11 UWP). One process, many tabs. Main UIA primitives available: READ → entire document text as a string SENDKEYS → type characters or keyboard shortcuts Key SENDKEYS shortcuts: {CTRL+A} select all {CTRL+C} copy {CTRL+V} paste {CTRL+Z} undo {CTRL+S} save {CTRL+W} close tab {CTRL+N} new tab {CTRL+P} print {ENTER} newline {BACK} backspace {DELETE} delete Application-level operations are expressed as scenarios: new-document → SENDKEYS {CTRL+N} (see scenarios.xml) save-as → SENDKEYS {CTRL+SHIFT+S} + type path + {ENTER} close-tab → SENDKEYS {CTRL+W} Targeting: use HANDLE:<hwnd> for precise tab targeting. Window title pattern: "<filename> – Poznámkový blok" (CZ) or "<filename> – Notepad" (EN); "Bez názvu" / "Untitled" = unsaved.

Group.label: Window chrome
Group.note: Structural/chrome controls — TitleBar and the synthetic window target. Read-only or keyboard-only.

Control.label: Title bar — shows current document name and unsaved-changes indicator (*)
Name property = window title, e.g. "Untitled – Notepad" or "* myfile.txt – Notepad". The leading asterisk (*) indicates unsaved changes. Not directly actionable for text editing.

Group.label: Document area (window-level, no AutomationId)
Group.note: All text I/O uses the window handle directly — no AutomationId for the edit area in Win11 UWP Notepad.

Control.note: synthetic — target is the hwnd, not an AutomationId
Control.label: The Notepad window / document area. READ returns full text content.

Target: use window title or HANDLE:<hwnd>. READ → multi-line string with full document text. SENDKEYS → types at current cursor position. To append to end: SENDKEYS {CTRL+END} first to move cursor to end. To select all: SENDKEYS {CTRL+A}. To replace all: SENDKEYS {CTRL+A} then type new text (replaces selection).
